# CommentCrafted — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A TikTok-native fashion brand that sells trending clothing inspired by viral TikTok content. The brand offers personalized mystery boxes where customers can submit custom requests, and creates unique custom t-shirts based on audience comments and reactions. The brand has a strong community-driven, interactive identity with a fun, Gen-Z social media culture vibe.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://commentcrafted-99f63350.zappy5.app
Shop trending e commerce fashion born from viral TikTok moments. CommentCrafted turns internet culture into wearable style. Join the community and snag your next fit today.

### Mystery Boxes
https://commentcrafted-99f63350.zappy5.app/mystery-boxes
Unbox custom e commerce fashion surprises tailored to your requests. Submit your vibe and let CommentCrafted craft a mystery box that&#39;s uniquely you. Dare to be styled.

### Custom Tees
https://commentcrafted-99f63350.zappy5.app/custom-tees
Rock custom tees built from real audience reactions. CommentCrafted transforms your best comments into limited-run e commerce fashion pieces. Claim your thread-inspired look.

### Community
https://commentcrafted-99f63350.zappy5.app/community
Dive into our interactive fashion e commerce companies community. Vote on designs, drop reactions, and shape the next drop at CommentCrafted. Your voice makes the fit.

### Contact
https://commentcrafted-99f63350.zappy5.app/contact
Got a fire idea or need fit help? Reach out to CommentCrafted, the e commerce fashion brand fueled by your voice. Let&#39;s make something viral together.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About CommentCrafted
A TikTok-native fashion brand that sells trending clothing inspired by viral TikTok content. The brand offers personalized mystery boxes where customers can submit custom requests, and creates unique custom t-shirts based on audience comments and reactions. The brand has a strong community-driven, interactive identity with a fun, Gen-Z social media culture vibe.

## Target Audience
- משתמשי טיקטוק, חובבי טרנדים ואופנה ויראלית
- TikTok Trendsetters
- Personalization Enthusiasts
- Mystery Box Adventurers

## Industry
E-commerce Fashion

---

- Products (JSON): https://commentcrafted-99f63350.zappy5.app/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://commentcrafted-99f63350.zappy5.app/product-feed.xml
